title: crocus inghamii
intro: Crocus inghamii, also known as the Ingham's crocus or the autumn crocus, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, the corms of Crocus inghamii have been used for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Crocus inghamii include relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
